titleStmt.title: SII 17.613: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 613. (A.R. No. 568 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Achalēśvara shrine in the south-east corner of the second prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
The praśasti Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara etc., of Rājēndra I is given at the beginning of this epigraph.

It seems to record an undertaking given by the temple officials at Tiruvārūr in Tiruvārūrkkūṟṟam in Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇi-vaḷanāḍu to arrange for the midday offerings to god Tiruvaraneṟi Dhanma-viḍaṅgadēvar. The Śrīkāryam of this temple was Nambaṉ Irāmaṉ alias Śōḻavijyā(vidyā)dhara-mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Tīya ṅguḍi in Iṅgaṇāḍu in Kshatriya-śikhāmaṇi-vaḷanāḍu. Other details are lost as the inscription is incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī— tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟcayappāvaiyum cirttaṉic celviyun taṉA portion in the middle is lost which may be restored as perunteviya in line 1 and kopparakecari in line 2. rāki Iṉpuṟaneṭutiyaluḻiuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭun tuṭarvaṉaveli paṭarvaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷic cūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaik kaṭakkamum porutiṭariḻattaraicar tammuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cuntara muṭiyum Intiraṉāramumteṇṭirai Īḻa maṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelait tol peruṅkāvaṟ palpaḻantivum ceruvi
ñ cāntimattivaraṇka Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum māpperu taṇṭāl koṇṭaA portion in the middle is lost which may be restored as perunteviya in line 1 and kopparakecari in line 2. panmarāṉa śrīrājentracoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 8 Āvatu kṣattriya śikhāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvārurk kūṟṟattu tiruvārur tiruvaraneṟip patipā ta mulap paṭṭuṭai pañcācāryya tevakaṉmikaḷom Uṭaiyaārkku śrīkāryyañ ceykiṉṟa kṣatriya śikhāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭu Iṅkaṇāṭṭu tīyaṅkuṭi tīyaṅkuṭaiyāṉ nampaṉ Irāmaṉāṉa coḻa vijyādharamuven=ta veḷāṉ nāyakattu tiruvaraneṟi dhanmaviṭaṅkadevarkku Uccavam potu tiruva(m)murtukku veṇṭum nivantattukku Ikkoyil tevatāṉam Innāṭṭu tiruvārurk kūṟṟattu meṉmaṅkalattu ŪrppaThe remaining portion is lost.Along with this inscription is found a fragment containing portions of a praśasti.
muṉaivaiyiṟṟurattiyum pala tiru pe karuḷci vara māḷikai takka ppa ta cekkam�rvacillavar tu pala paḻa
var pallavar kaucalar vaṅkaṇar koṅkaṇa cinturar Aiyaṇar ciṅkaṇar paṅka Āntira mutaliyar Araciṭu tiraikaḷum
ṟavaṉiyil kūṟu koḷ poruḷkaḷum Ukantu ṉāḷ ṅ mukantu koḷ nta viśvalokattu viḷaṅ
Digital edition of SII 17.613 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
